claim_boundary: Publisher and open-source acquisition was attempted for the FRC reference papers needed by the B.8/B.11/FUS-C external-parity workstream. Raw PDFs and publisher probe payloads are cached only under ignored internal documentation paths; this tracked manifest records provenance, checksums, and blocked download status without promoting paper PDFs to validation data.

papers.citation: L. C. Steinhauer, Review of field-reversed configurations, Physics of Plasmas 18, 070501 (2011).
papers.notes: AIP publisher article and PDF endpoints returned HTTP 403 HTML payloads, not a PDF. The accepted no-rotation FRC implementation still needs verified Steinhauer Section II.B/Fig. 3 closure before rotating BVP promotion.

papers.citation: Y. Ono, M. Inomoto, T. Okazaki, and Y. Ueda, Magnetic-mode-based modeling for field-reversed configurations, Physics of Plasmas 4, 1953 (1997).
papers.notes: AIP publisher article and PDF endpoints returned HTTP 403 HTML payloads, not a PDF. FUS-C.2 Ono Fig. 4 digitised/same-case parity remains externally blocked.

papers.citation: E. V. Belova, S. C. Jardin, H. Ji, M. Yamada, and R. Kulsrud, Numerical Study of Tilt Stability of Prolate Field-Reversed Configurations, PPPL-3456 (2000).
papers.notes: Open PPPL report acquired for FUS-C.5 tilt-stability hardening context. This is reference-paper evidence only; no Belova Table I digitised parity artifact has been extracted or accepted.

papers.citation: E. V. Belova, S. C. Jardin, H. Ji, M. Yamada, and R. Kulsrud, Numerical study of tilt stability of prolate field-reversed configurations, Physics of Plasmas 8, 1267 (2001).
papers.notes: AIP journal article and PDF endpoints returned HTTP 403 HTML payloads. Use the open PPPL report for local reference context until journal access or an allowed public copy is available.

papers.citation: J. Slough, G. Votroubek, and C. Pihl, Creation of a high-temperature plasma through merging and compression of supersonic field reversed configuration plasmoids, Nuclear Fusion 51, 053008 (2011).
papers.notes: No machine-readable Figure 5 trajectory or publisher PDF was acquired. B.11 remains blocked on public digitized Slough data, author-provided data, or a human/manual extraction workflow.

papers.citation: J. A. Romero, S. A. Dettrick, E. Granstedt, T. Roche, and Y. Mok, Inference of field reversed configuration topology and dynamics during Alfvenic transients, Nature Communications 9, 691 (2018).
papers.claim_boundary: Open-access C-2U/C-2W FRC topology-inference paper metadata only; not Steinhauer rotating-BVP closure, not Slough 2011 Fig. 5 trajectory data, and not a pulsed-compression benchmark.
papers.notes: Nature PDF acquired from publisher and matches the user-provided internal TOSORT PDF checksum.

papers.citation: E. A. Baltz, E. Trask, M. Binderbauer, M. Dikovsky, H. Gota, R. Mendoza, J. C. Platt, and P. F. Riley, Achievement of Sustained Net Plasma Heating in a Fusion Experiment with the Optometrist Algorithm, Scientific Reports 7, 6425 (2017).
papers.claim_boundary: Public C-2U positive-net-heating performance evidence only; not Slough 2011 Fig. 5 trajectory parity and not a time-resolved pulsed-compression benchmark.
papers.notes: Publisher PDF and supplemental CSV acquired. The tracked derived table remains validation/reference_data/frc_public/c2u_optometrist_positive_heating_shots.csv.
